question: Why did the top military commanders of Brazil meet in March 2021?
ground_truth: They discussed the possibility of resigning jointly in response to the dismissal of Defense Minister Fernando Azevedo.
event_desc: According to reports from O Globo and Folha de S.Paulo, military commanders Edson Leal Pujol (army), Ilques Barbosa Junior (navy), and Antonio Carlos Moretti Bermudez (air force) meet to discuss their possible resignations.
